💗
Healthcare

Diagnostic support, clinicians still in charge

In healthcare, the bar for AI is trust, not novelty. We design diagnostic and patient-management support that gives clinicians better information, faster — while every clinical decision stays firmly theirs.

Diagnostic support, not diagnosis

Agents surface patterns and flag anomalies for clinical review — the final call always sits with a qualified professional.

Patient management, less admin

Scheduling, records, and follow-up coordination handled by agents, freeing clinical staff to spend time with patients instead of paperwork.

Privacy and compliance by design

Access controls, data residency, and audit trails reviewed against healthcare-specific compliance requirements before anything goes live.

85%
threat detection accuracy (comparable deployment)

The same rigorous, human-in-the-loop discipline we apply in high-stakes cybersecurity environments — monitoring continuously, flagging clearly, deciding humanly — is what we bring to healthcare AI deployments.

Want AI that supports clinicians instead of second-guessing them?

Email Lisa Warren directly — a quick conversation to map where your revenue is leaking.

⚡ Contact Us Talk to Lisa
